name: Thor
description: Thor Odinson, Crown Prince of Asgard and God of Thunder, wields the enchanted hammer Mjolnir and later the axe Stormbreaker to channel devastating lightning. Banished to Earth by his father Odin to learn humility, Thor grew from an arrogant warrior-prince into a wise protector of the Nine Realms. He has faced the Destroyer, the Dark Elves, Hela the Goddess of Death, and Thanos. His journey through loss forged him into something greater than a god.
